title: Petco Reports Third Quarter 2025 Financial Results
text: Petco Reports Third Quarter 2025 Financial Results. Q3 2025 Performance: Petco announced third quarter 2025 financial results showing continued operational improvements despite challenging retail environment. The company focused on its core strategy of margin expansion and operational efficiency. Business Performance: The quarter demonstrated the company's ability to improve profitability metrics despite modest revenue trends. Adjusted EBITDA showed healthy progress and the company maintained discipline on cost management. Key Metrics: The company reported progress on its transformation initiatives and strengthened its liquidity position. Management emphasized that strategic initiatives were delivering results as planned. Guidance and Outlook: The company provided guidance for full year 2025 indicating confidence in achieving profitability targets. This included guidance for adjusted EBITDA and free cash flow metrics that reflected the ongoing turnaround narrative. Strategic Priorities: Management highlighted ongoing investment in pet services, including veterinary hospitals and grooming, as key drivers of high-margin revenue growth.
